Later, co-host and retired Green Beret, Mike Glover, gives the contestants a life lesson on survival they won’t soon forget. To top off the episode, one of the contestants demonstrates his industry-changing hollow point bullets in some meaty targets.

programme.title: Aftermath

Luckily for the competitors, he had a special demonstration ready that involved hollow points and gel blocks. Later, Matthew recaps his experience with “The Glove”. To cap things off, Chris also sits down with BodyHz to talk about innovations in the non-chemical health industry.

programme.title: Surviving Mann

The contestants have a hard time keeping a smile off their faces as they shoot at targets and then blow them up.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Competitors Stephen and Danny sit down to recap the best and worst moments so far in the season. Also, Chris and Cindy sit down with Compliant Technologies’ founder to get the backstory on how the innovative product that is sweeping the nation (and terrorizing the contestants) came to be. Then Dr. West drops some truth bombs on the state of the average human body’s blood.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: CQB training is imperative for mission success, and since Don doesn’t do anything half-heartedly, it was time for a road trip. Equipped with Titanium Foam suppressors (yeah, you read that right), the team is ready to test their skills in an elite training facility. Afterwards, we check in with Dr. Jen for a sneak peak at the new Surviving Mann: All Stars filming location.

programme.desc: Ariel meets up with astronaut John Herrington and they explore colorful Colorado.

programme.title: Trails and Trailblazers
programme.desc: John and Ariel get a taste for rock formations and hot air balloons on their road trip across the “Land of Enchantment”.

programme.title: Trails and Trailblazers
programme.desc: John and Ariel check out the rich history of Niagara Falls before discovering the beautiful gorges and lakes the state has to offer.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: Susan Hayward stars in this dramatic tale of the Oklahoma oil boom. She plays Cherokee Lansing, a determined young woman out to protect her father's honor after he's killed by men from a competing oil company. With a cast that includes Robert Preston, ...

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Roy Rogers's beloved horse Trigger is stolen and held for ransom money. Will Roy find $100,000 to get his faithful companion back, or will he find a way to trap the gang holding the horse hostage? Along with Roy and Trigger, you'l...

programme.title: Cowboy And The Prizefighter
programme.desc: Red Ryder takes Steve Stevenson, who has saved his life, to his ranch and gives him a job. Red's aunt, the Duchess, knew Steve's father, who supposedly committed suicide after losing his ranch betting on a prizefight. Steve refuses to believe that his ...

programme.title: Hell Town
programme.desc: In Hell Town (aka Born to the West) John Wayne is back in the saddle as two-fisted Dare Rudd, a roaming cowhand trying to prove he can win a woman's love and outwit a crooked saloon owner. This exciting B-movie from Paramount Pictures was based on a no...

programme.title: In Old Colorado
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy and his crew get involved in a war over water rights in this feature from Harry Sherman Productions and Paramount Pictures. The intrigue starts when crafty Joe Weller (Morris Ankrum) turns two ranchers against each other, which leads t...

programme.title: The Blood Line
programme.desc: 16-year-old Todd Grayson arrives from Boston to Virginia City and learns his dad was killed by Ben Cartwright.

programme.title: The Avenger
programme.desc: Ben and Adam are locked in jail, about to be hung for a crime they didn't commit.

programme.title: Bitter Water
programme.desc: Andy son wants to sell their land but will spoil the water rights agreement Andy and Ben made years ago.

programme.title: Feet Of Clay
programme.desc: A boy's convict father escapes prison, and the Cartwrights must protect him at the Ponderosa.

programme.title: Larry McMurtry's Dead Man's Walk: Part 1
programme.desc: Gus McCrae and Woodrow Call join an ill-conceived effort to capture Santa Fe and annex New Mexico.

programme.title: Law of the Lawless
programme.desc: An 1880s judge (Dale Robertson) presides over a murder trial and the corruption that goes with it.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A mayoral candidate hires two hoodlums to harass Chinese residents, resulting in murder.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ex-dancehall girl poses as Spanish aristocrat to obtain large piece of property.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A woman comes to town and takes a job as a faro dealer to find her gambling brother.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister investigates when a disheveled prison escapee comes to town and declares his innocence.

programme.title: The Crooked Trail (1936)
programme.desc: A rancher uncovers a scheme by a corrupt rival to steal land and cattle, forcing him to take justice into his own hands to clear his name and save the valley.

programme.title: Sundown Saunders Bob Steele 1935
programme.desc: After winning a high-stakes horse race, a cowboy is paid with the deed to a ranch, only to discover a family already living there after being scammed by a fraudulent land agent. When the crooked agent frames him for murder, he must evade the law to clear his name and protect the family from further ruin

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 9 Breed of Violence
programme.desc: When Joe Cartwright is accused of murder after a violent confrontation in a nearby town, Ben Cartwright must race against time and a vengeful sheriff to prove his son's innocence before he is subjected to mob justice

programme.title: The - Courageous Avenger1935
programme.desc: A lawman goes undercover to investigate a string of gold shipment robberies, discovering that the local mine owner is behind the thefts and is forcing captured travelers into slave labor

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E20 The Wild Bunch of Wyoming
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark heads into the rugged Wyoming wilderness to track down the infamous Wild Bunch. Facing off against a highly organized gang of outlaws who know the terrain better than anyone, Clark must use all his wits to dismantle their stronghold and bring the gang to justice before they can pull off their next major heist

programme.title: Young Bill Hickok 1940
programme.desc: Roy Rogers saddles up in Young Bill Hickok, an action-packed Western adventure inspired by the early days of the legendary frontier hero. As war clouds gather over a divided nation, Hickok faces treacherous outlaws, secret Confederate plots, and high-stakes gun battles that threaten the peace of the West. With courage, quick draw, and a song on his lips, Rogers brings larger-than-life charm to this thrilling tale of loyalty, justice, and the making of a legend.

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan
programme.desc: The true story of Irish outlaw Daniel Morgan, who is wanted, dead or alive, in Australia during the 1850s.

programme.title: Apache Rose
programme.desc: Roy is an oil prospector. His efforts to get drilling rights on an old Spanish land grant are countered by gamblers from an off-shore gambling boat determined to control the land (and oil) themselves.

programme.title: 3 Bullets for Ringo
programme.desc: Ringo Carson has a tough life. First, he has a falling out with his best friend, Frank Sanders, after saving Jane, the girl he loves, from Mexican kidnappers in order to extort a ransom from her gunrunner father.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade 1953
programme.desc: In Son of the Renegade, cowboy star Johnny Carpenter saddles up for a tale of legacy and justice. As the son of a notorious outlaw, he fights to escape the shadow of his father’s crimes and prove himself a man of honor. With outlaws closing in and the law on his trail, he takes a stand to defend the innocent and clear his name. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes drama, and frontier grit, this Western asks—can the son of a renegade carve out a destiny of his own?
